name: Shop
description: An interactive shopping system that displays a customizable HTML-based shop interface when players approach. Supports multiple items with prices, payment types, and visual customization. Creates dynamic UI overlay with shop image, intro dialog, and grid-based item display. Integrates with prefab system for item management and preloading.
documentation:
## Shop
Create an in-game shop where players can buy items.

### Settings
- **Shop Image** - Image displayed in the shop UI
- **Intro Dialog** - Text shown when the shop opens

### Items
Add items to the shop inventory:
- **Name** - Display name for the item
- **Item** - Prefab to give the player on purchase
- **Payment** - Currency prefab required
- **Cost** - Price of the item

### Tips
- Use Consumable behavior on currency items for collecting
- Players need to collect payment items before purchasing
- Combine with NPC behavior for a shopkeeper character
author: stemstudio

shopImage.name: Shop Image
shopImage.description: The image displayed at the top of the shop UI when the player opens the shop.

introDialog.name: Intro Dialog
introDialog.description: The welcome text shown to the player when the shop interface opens.

itemDisplayName.name: Name
itemDisplayName.description: The display name shown to the player for this shop item.

itemId.name: Item
itemId.description: The prefab that will be given to the player upon purchasing this item.

paymentType.name: Payment
paymentType.description: The currency prefab required to purchase this item. Players must collect this item type to pay.

price.name: Cost
price.description: The number of payment items required to buy this item.
